languages.text: "Повергните ксеносского командира, и это станет ключом к нашей славной победе!"
"Destroy the xenos commander and seize the key to our glorious victory!"
languages.original_text: "Повергните ксеносского командира, и это станет ключом к нашей славной победе!"

traits.locale_text: "Destroy the xenos commander and seize the key to our glorious victory!"
"Destroy the xenos commander and seize the key to our glorious victory!"
"Deprive the xenos of their main advantage, and we will have a glorious victory!"
"Destroy the xenos commander and seize the key to our glorious victory!"
"Destroy the xenos commander and seize the key to our glorious victory!"

languages.text: 「異種族の最大の利点を奪えば、我々は栄光ある勝利を収めるだろう！」
languages.original_text: "Deprive the xenos of their main advantage, and we will have a glorious victory!"

traits.locale_text: 「異種族の最大の利点を奪えば、我々は栄光ある勝利を収めるだろう！」

languages.text: «¡Destruyan al comandante xenos y háganse con la clave de la victoria!».
languages.original_text: "Destroy the xenos commander and seize the key to our glorious victory!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Destruyan al comandante xenos y háganse con la clave de la victoria!».

languages.text: “消灭异形指挥官，夺取属于我们的光荣胜利！”
languages.original_text: "Destroy the xenos commander and seize the key to our glorious victory!"

traits.locale_text: “消灭异形指挥官，夺取属于我们的光荣胜利！”

languages.text: "Vernichtet den Commander der Xenos und sichert Euch den Schlüssel zu unserem ruhmreichen Sieg.
languages.original_text: "Destroy the xenos commander and seize the key to our glorious victory!"

traits.locale_text: "Vernichtet den Commander der Xenos und sichert Euch den Schlüssel zu unserem ruhmreichen Sieg.

languages.text: "Zeno komutanlarını yok edin ve şanlı zaferimizin anahtarını ele geçirin!"
languages.original_text: "Destroy the xenos commander and seize the key to our glorious victory!"

traits.locale_text: "Zeno komutanlarını yok edin ve şanlı zaferimizin anahtarını ele geçirin!"

languages.text: « Anéantissez le commandant xénos pour nous assurer la clé d'une glorieuse victoire ! »
languages.original_text: "Destroy the xenos commander and seize the key to our glorious victory!"

traits.locale_text: « Anéantissez le commandant xénos pour nous assurer la clé d'une glorieuse victoire ! »
